synopsis:
Bounty Hunters 15 is the fifteenth issue of the canon comic book series Star Wars: Bounty Hunters, and is part of the Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters event. The issue is written by Ethan Sacks, illustrated by Paolo Villanelli, and published by Marvel Comics.
WAR OF THE BOUNTY HUNTERS: "THE GATHERING"
VALANCE and DENGAR travel to CANTO BIGHT as a relentless assassin stalks them!
T'ONGA starts to recruit a bounty hunter crew with some familiar — and fearsome — faces!
Plus TASU LEECH returns! But whose side is he on?
title: Bounty Hunters #15
